_comment: Studio-side curation SSOT for the website live-demo gallery. The engine is read-only (ubpa), so which apps/hello/* to showcase + their copy/order/flags live HERE, not in the engine. build-examples.mjs reads this. `dir` is relative to <engine>/apps/hello. `coi` injects coi-serviceworker (COOP/COEP shim) for threaded-wasm examples on header-less static hosting (github.io).

blurb.en: The minimal WebGPU/WebGL2 pipeline — one triangle, shader-compiled WGSL.
blurb.zh: 最小的 WebGPU/WebGL2 管线 —— 一个三角形,WGSL 编译着色。

blurb.en: Parent/child transforms — orbiting nodes driven by a scene graph.
blurb.zh: 父子变换 —— 由场景图驱动的公转节点。

blurb.en: Load and render a glTF 2.0 asset with PBR materials.
blurb.zh: 加载并渲染带 PBR 材质的 glTF 2.0 资产。

blurb.en: 2D sprite rendering — batched quads with a texture atlas.
blurb.zh: 2D 精灵渲染 —— 图集纹理的批量四边形。

blurb.en: Click to select — per-pixel object id read back from the GPU.
blurb.zh: 点击选择 —— 从 GPU 回读逐像素对象 id。

blurb.en: Fast approximate anti-aliasing as a post-process pass.
blurb.zh: 作为后处理通道的快速近似抗锯齿。

blurb.en: HDR bloom — bright-pass + separable blur + composite.
blurb.zh: HDR 泛光 —— 亮部提取 + 可分离模糊 + 合成。

blurb.en: HDR to display — ACES / Reinhard tone mapping operators.
blurb.zh: HDR 到显示 —— ACES / Reinhard 色调映射算子。

blurb.en: Rigid-body physics via Rapier (wasm) driving ECS transforms.
blurb.zh: Rapier(wasm)刚体物理驱动 ECS 变换。
